articles.title: Fantom (FTM) Secret Weapon: Could This Project Be The Next Big Thing In Crypto?
articles.description: Fantom (FTM) is a blockchain project that has gained attention in the crypto space for its unique features and potential. Despite a recent dip in key metrics such as Total Value Locked (TVL), the project has something special that many believe is worth attention. Related Reading: Avalanche Breaks $14 Price Level, Yet Remains Hinged On Crucial Resistance Is Fantom Poised To Disrupt The Crypto...

articles.title: Solana blockchain integrates ChatGPT plugin, launches AI accelerator
articles.description: Solana co-founder Anatoly Yakovenko says that AI and the ChatGPT plugin will make the Solana blockchain more usable and understandable.

articles.title: Dash Blockchain Collapses After A Botched Upgrade
articles.description: Multiple sources have reported that the Dash blockchain came to a standstill at block height 1,874,879 following an attempted upgrade to version 19 by the developers. As of now, data indicates that the most recent block verified on the network was over 16 hours ago. Dash Network Upgrade Fails, Resulting in Block Production Halt, Cause […]

articles.title: Shiba Inu’s Puppynet Testnet Logs 10M Transactions, Putting Ecosystem Tokens in Focus
articles.description: Ecosystem tokens shiba inu, leash and bone will be used to transact on the upcoming Ethereum-based blockchain.
